top_signals.title: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
top_signals.summary: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: CISA Adds Three Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog
top_signals.summary:
CISA has added three new vulnerabilities to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) Catalog, based on evidence of active exploitation.

  • CVE-2026-8398 Daemon Tools Lite Embedded Malicious Code Vulnerability
  • CVE-2026-45321 TanStack Unspecified Vulnerability
  • CVE-2026-48027 Nx Console Embedded Malicious Code Vulnerability

These types of vulnerabilities are frequent attack vectors for malicious cyber actors and pose significant risks to the federal enterprise.

Binding Operational Directive (BOD) 22-01: Reducing the Significant Risk of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities established the KEV Catalog as a living list of known Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) that carry significant risk to the federal enterprise. BOD 22-01 requires Federal Civilian Executive Branch (FCEB) agencies to remediate identified vulnerabilities by the due date to protect FCEB networks against active threats. See the BOD 22-01 Fact Sheet for more information.

Although BOD 22-01 only applies to FCEB agencies, CISA strongly urges all organizations to reduce their exposure to cyberattacks by prioritizing timely remediation of KEV Catalog vulnerabilities as part of their vulnerability management practice. CISA will continue to add vulnerabilities to the catalog that meet the specified criteria.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Oil Investments to Drop for Third Year on War Shock, IEA Says - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Investments to Drop for Third Year on War Shock, IEA Says  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Standard Chartered compares Ethereum to Amazon during 2001 dot-com bubble burst, says ETH will catch up to internal metrics
top_signals.summary: Standard Chartered Bank has maintained its ether price targets of $4,000 by end-2026 and $40,000 by end-2030.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cameco resumes output after flood hits top uranium mine access
top_signals.summary: Uranium giant says bridge collapse did not alter production outlook at key northern Saskatchewan operations.
